zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe von Kärnten於1290年出生在奧地利亞特時，她的父親Albert II von Tirol und Görz30歲，母親Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol26歲。她和Frederick IV von Nuremberg至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1348年6月26日在德國貝也斯塔特 安 德 艾享年58歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 比可費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarethe von Kärnten于1290年出生在奥地利亞特时，她的父亲Albert II von Tirol und Görz30岁，母亲Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol26岁。她和Frederick IV von Nuremberg至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1348年6月26日在德国貝也斯塔特 安 德 艾享年58岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 比可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kärnten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erhardt, Ernst, Hans, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Orlo, Siegfried.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Carsten  , itself a variant of   Christian  .

variants.name: Kasten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Aloysius, Armin, Arno, Dietrich, Eldor, Ernst, Klaus, Otto, Wilhelm.
North German, East Frisian, North Frisian, and Dutch: from a vernacular variant of the personal name   Karsten  .

German: from Middle High German kasten ‘chest, coffer’ or kornkasten ‘grain bin’, hence a metonymic occupational name for the manager of a granary, and later for the treasurer of an estate or guild. See also Kastner .

variants.name: Carsten
meanings: North German and Dutch: from the personal name Carsten, a variant of Christian . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variant Karsten .

variants.name: Karstens
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Vernice.
North German, Dutch, and Danish: patronymic from   Karsten  . Compare   Carstens  .

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe von Kärnten was born in 1290, in Carinthia, Austria, her father, Albert II von Tirol und Görz, was 30 and her mother, Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, was 26. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Frederick IV von Nuremberg. She died on 26 June 1348, in Neustadt an der Aisch, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 58, and was buried in Birkenfeld, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe von Kärnten est née en 1290, à Kärnten, Autriche, son père, Albert II von Tirol und Görz, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Frederick IV von Nuremberg. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1348, à Neustadt an der Aisch, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe von Kärnten 1290 in Kärnten, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert II von Tirol und Görz 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol 26. Sie hatte mit Frederick IV von Nuremberg mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1348 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Neustadt an der Aisch, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Kärnten è nata il nel 1290 nel Carinzia, Austria, sua padre, Albert II von Tirol und Görz, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Frederick IV von Nuremberg. Morì il 26 giugno 1348, nel Neustadt an der Aisch, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Kärntenが1290年にオーストリアクaルンテンで生まれた時，父Albert II von Tirol und Görzは30歳，母Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirolは26歳であった。彼女はFrederick IV von Nurembergとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1348年6月26日にドイツバイエルンネウスタト アン ダー エイッシュで58歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バーケンフエルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Kärnten(이)가 1290년 오스트리아 ka른텐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert II von Tirol und Görz(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Frederick IV von Nuremberg(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 6월 26일 독일 베이른 니우스타드트 앤 데르 아이슈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 비르켄펠드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Kärnten nasceu em 1290, em Kärnten, Áustria, seu pai, Albert II von Tirol und Görz, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Frederick IV von Nuremberg. Ela faleceu em 26 de junho de 1348, em Neustadt an der Aisch, Bayern, Alemanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe von Kärnten родилась в 1290 г. в местности кaрнтен, Австрия, её отцу по имени Albert II von Tirol und Görz было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Frederick IV von Nuremberg. Она умерла 26 июня 1348 г. в местности неустадт ан дир эищ, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис биркенфелд, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarethe von Kärnten nació en 1290, en Kärnten, Austria, su papá, Albert II von Tirol und Görz, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Frederick IV von Nuremberg. Murió el 26 de junio de 1348, en Neustadt an der Aisch, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
